title: Create Python learning platform with tutorials and practice exercises

requirements.text: Create a homepage that welcomes users and provides an overview of the Python learning platform with navigation to tutorials and practice sections
acceptanceCriteria: Homepage displays welcome message explaining the platform purpose
Navigation clearly shows links to tutorials and practice areas
Interface is beginner-friendly and intuitive

requirements.text: Implement a tutorials section with Python programming lessons organized by difficulty level (beginner, intermediate) covering core concepts like variables, data types, loops, functions, and basic data structures

quotes: learn about python programming in very easy way

acceptanceCriteria: Tutorials are organized by difficulty level with clear progression
Each tutorial includes clear explanations with code examples
Content covers fundamental Python concepts: variables, data types, control flow, functions, lists, dictionaries
Explanations use simple, beginner-friendly language

requirements.text: Create a practice exercises section where users can write and run Python code directly in the browser to solve programming challenges
acceptanceCriteria: Users can type Python code in an interactive code editor
Code can be executed and results displayed immediately
Practice exercises include problem descriptions and expected outputs
Exercises are categorized by topic and difficulty

requirements.text: Store user progress on tutorials and practice exercises so they can track which lessons they have completed and which exercises they have solved
acceptanceCriteria: Backend persists user progress for tutorials and exercises
Users can see which tutorials they have completed
Users can see which practice problems they have solved
Progress is maintained across sessions

requirements.text: Implement a code execution system that safely runs user-submitted Python code and returns output or error messages
acceptanceCriteria: Backend can evaluate Python code syntax and logic
System returns execution results or error messages to the user
Code validation provides helpful feedback for common mistakes

requirements.text: Apply a creative, educational visual design theme with warm, encouraging colors and clear typography that makes learning feel accessible and non-intimidating, with consistent styling across tutorials and practice sections
acceptanceCriteria: Visual theme uses warm, welcoming colors that encourage learning
Typography is clear and highly readable for educational content
Design creates an approachable, beginner-friendly atmosphere
Styling is consistent across all sections of the platform

constraints: Python code execution must be simulated through Motoko logic as actual Python runtime is not available on the Internet Computer
Code execution should validate syntax and provide educational feedback rather than full Python interpretation
nonGoals: Advanced Python topics like async/await, decorators, or metaclasses
Integration with external Python execution services
Community features like forums or user-to-user messaging

required: Friendly Python logo or mascot illustration with educational theme for the homepage hero section (python-hero.dim_800x400.png)
Icon representing tutorials or learning with book and code symbols (tutorials-icon.dim_256x256.png)
Icon representing practice exercises with code editor and checkmark symbols (practice-icon.dim_256x256.png)
